CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-03-2015 Off Calendar

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS , CGC-15-544679 WITH CASE CGC-15-544798
Off Calendar May-21-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
G. Ryan Patrick, Esq. of Weigel Law Group, (415-552-8230), for Prado Defendants, moving parties.
No other appearances.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTs PRADO GP 333 LLC, THE PRADO GROUP INC. and 333 VALENCIA LP's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS, CGC-15-544679 WITH CASE CGC-15-544798 is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Actions CGC-15-544679 and CGC-15-544798 are consolidated for all purposes. CGC-15-544679 shall be the lead case. Order is signed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.
